problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
